title: botrychium angustisegmentum
intro: Botrychium angustisegmentum, also known as the narrow-segmented grape fern, is a type of rare and endangered fern species belonging to the family Ophioglossaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. It is believed to provide health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the rhizomes and leaves of the plant are often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, although its availability and usage are strictly regulated due to its endangered status.
